creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 224088
atf-marvell-gtk patch

Add support for ATF building for SolidRun's Marvell GT 8K SoC.

This makes use of atf-master and downloads extra files needed for Marvell.
I have not figured out how to not duplicate/extend distinfo between parent/child port.

Depends on PR 255037.
